Bug / Task Description: Histogram.Observe places boundary observations in the wrong bucket. A value exactly equal to a bucket's upper bound is skipped past that bucket and counted in the next higher bucket (or the overflow), instead of being counted in the bucket whose upper bound it equals. This violates standard cumulative-histogram semantics where a bucket counts observations less than or equal to its upper bound. Fix bucket selection so that a value equal to a boundary is counted in that boundary's bucket.
Commit Subject: fix(metrics): count boundary values in their own histogram bucket
